params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있나요?
params.context: Wrtn iter 6 — RE-DIAGNOSIS CONFLICT. Engine logs (2026-05-15 10:00-10:02) prove wrtn DOES use Socket.IO WS at api.wrtn.ai/wrtn.socket.io/. ws_blocked fires correctly with keyword=주민등록번호 + ws_inject 155B text frame. But ws_envelope_type='' (empty) → plain text frame silently dropped by Socket.IO client. #965 frontend inspect saw 0 WS likely due to ws_inflate_hard_error at 10:20 (LZ77 window unrecoverable) + hooks-installed-too-late. No config changes applied in iter 6 (HTTP axis appears WRONG direction). This test = baseline measurement.
